title: Exploring Federated Learning Based Cardiac Monitoring
description: Poster presentation on prototyping ECG monitoring with federated learning for privacy-preserving cardiac data analysis.
highlights: ECG sensor was inaccurate and needed more denoising for usable data
Used an online database for transfer learning

title: A Low-Cost Internet of Things Cloud-Based Solution for the Intelligent Rearing of the Black Soldier Fly
description: IEEE AFRICON 2023 published paper presenting an IoT-based system for monitoring and optimizing Black Soldier Fly larvae farming conditions.
highlights: Co-authored an IEEE AFRICON 2023 paper on IoT-based Black Soldier Fly farming
Presented the paper at AFRICON conference
Designed database flow and backend with Python and Firebase
